name: HAVERTY FURNITURE COMPANIES INC
business: Havertys is a specialty retailer of residential furniture and accessories, operating 129 stores in 17 states in the Southern and Midwest regions of the U.S., with an online presence. The company targets middle to upper-middle income households, primarily women who own homes in suburbs.

exposures.sentence: Virtually all of the furniture merchandise we carry bears the Havertys brand.
Successful cyber-attacks and the failure to maintain adequate cyber-security systems and procedures could materially harm our business.

We have and plan to continue to partner with third parties that utilize artificial intelligence (AI) tools and to invest in AI technologies to enhance our customers shopping experience and our employees work experience and to improve efficiencies of our supply chain, operations, management functions and talent recruitment and development.

catalysts.event: Open store in St. Louis, MO
Capital expenditures of approximately $33.5 million in 2026
catalysts.sentence: We expect capital expenditures of approximately $33.5 million in 2026 to support our operations and strategic expansion, however these plans are subject to other potential opportunities, the economic environment, general business conditions and our financial performance.

catalysts.event: Complete mattress floor presentation and design center portions of the program
catalysts.sentence: We expect to complete the mattress floor presentation and design center portions of the program over the next two years.
